Same outward behavior as s09: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in, agent reply out.
The new externally-visible signal is `[s10] autocompact TTL: ...` (printed
in -v mode) and, if the AutoCompact goroutine fired during this turn,
`[s10] autocompact summary: ...`.

$ go run . -workspace /tmp/agent-demo -autocompact-ttl 1m -v "Tokyo weather"
[s10] bootstrap files present: 0/4 ([AGENTS.md SOUL.md USER.md TOOLS.md])
[s10] loaded 2 skill(s) from workspace="/tmp/agent-demo/skills" builtin=".../testdata/skills"
       - echo
       - weather
[s10] skills requested for system prompt: []
[s10] autocompact TTL: 1m0s
[s10] system prompt: 612 chars; messages: 1
[iter 0] -> bash {command:curl -s wttr.in/Tokyo?format=3}
[iter 0] <- Tokyo: ☀ +18°C
[iter 0] assistant: ...
[s10] hook recorded 1 tool invocation(s): [bash]
Tokyo: clear, 18°C.

The Consolidator's job is not exercised by a single-turn CLI run. To see
it work end-to-end, build a session that's been idle for 100ms+, then
call CheckExpired with an empty active-keys map. The unit tests do
exactly this:

  TestAutoCompact_IdleSession_GetsCompacted    — happy path
  TestAutoCompact_ActiveSession_Skipped         — sacred-active-key invariant
  TestAutoCompact_AlreadyArchiving_Skipped      — idempotency

The Consolidator picks the boundary, calls FakeProvider for a one-line
summary, writes /tmp/agent-demo/cli_idle-summary.md, and advances
session.LastConsolidated to the chosen boundary.End.

Tests:

$ go test -count=1 -race ./...
ok      learn-nanobot/s10       0.6s

Total: 9 tests covering boundary picking, summary persistence, cursor
advancement, ErrNoLegalBoundary, AutoCompact happy path, active-session
skip, in-flight idempotency, Run-loop ctx-cancel, and the
tool_result-not-a-boundary invariant.
